## Checklist

- [ ] Help screen updated (`draw_help` / `draw_endless_help` in `src/ui.rs`) if keys added, removed, or rebound
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] `README.md` updated if user-facing behaviour changed
- [ ] `ROADMAP.md` updated if a planned item is completed or changed scope
- [ ] Version bumped in `Cargo.toml` (patch for fixes, minor for features, major for breaking changes)
- [ ] Tested in a true-colour terminal (Ghostty, Kitty, WezTerm)
